sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97247" key="stroggulo/lobos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρογγῠλό-λοβος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n97247.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with round pods</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:8:5:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.5.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
